page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.13xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.re6p family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 52 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 52 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor, operating with a single thread per core. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention from hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.69 GB of RAM per core, which establishes a balanced resource profile.

This server does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this configuration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.re6p.13xlarge offers a high density of dedicated physical cores relative to its memory footprint, making it suitable for workloads that require predictable CPU execution without the overhead of multi-threading. The absence of local storage and GPUs positions this instance as a specialized compute-and-memory resource. It is well-suited for workloads such as general-purpose application servers, batch processing, medium-sized databases, and containerized microservices that benefit from dedicated physical execution units.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.13xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. It features 52 physical cores and 52 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core to deliver consistent, non-hyperthreaded compute performance. The system is configured with 192.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced ratio of 3.69 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it provides a stable environment for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation. The ecs.re6p.13xlarge is designed for general-purpose applications, batch processing, and database workloads that demand predictable processing power without resource sharing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.13xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 52 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores, 192 GB of RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for predictable general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.13xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server with 52 physical Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated physical-core server featuring balanced memory allocation and consistent processing performance for enterprise workloads.

192.0 GB of system memory providing 3.69 GB per core
KVM hypervisor architecture with dedicated CPU allocation
Designed for general-purpose applications, batch processing, and databases
